---
title: "Variante A: Pure Platform-Mirror"
subtitle: "1:1-Port der Lernplattform-DNA: OKLch · Geist · editorial-rise"
author: "Design-Mockup"
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-iframe: ""
format:
  revealjs:
    theme:
      - default
      - redesign/tokens-platform.scss
      - redesign/motion-editorial.scss
      - redesign/variant-a-pure.scss
    include-in-header: []
    include-after-body: []
    template-partials: []
    incremental: true
    transition: none
    background-transition: fade
    transition-speed: slow
    smaller: false
    scrollable: true
    slide-number: false
    footer: "Design-Mockup · Variante A"
---

{{< include redesign/_shared-content.qmd >}}
